title: No Compensation, No Help: The Silent Victims Of 2013 Bastar Maoist Massacre
description: Quiet Aftershocks Of Jhiram Ghati Massacre - Part 3: On May 25, 2013, as the Maoist guns turned part of it red, killing 32 people and sparking shock and outrage, for a mother in this remote corner, time stopped. Rambha Devi Joshi still lives in a bub
